groups.name: smart.i18n
groups.description: Smart I18N Auto - Automatic internationalization middleware configuration.

properties.name: smart.i18n.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the Smart I18N Auto middleware entirely.

properties.name: smart.i18n.source-locale
properties.description: The base/source language of the application content (BCP-47 code).

properties.name: smart.i18n.default-target-locale
properties.description: Default target language when none is detected from the request.

properties.name: smart.i18n.header-name
properties.description: Custom HTTP header name to read target language from.

properties.name: smart.i18n.query-param
properties.description: Query parameter name to read target language from.

properties.name: smart.i18n.translate-request-body
properties.description: Whether to translate incoming request bodies to the source locale.

properties.name: smart.i18n.provider.active
properties.description: Explicitly select a provider: 'google-cloud', 'gemini', or 'openai'. Auto-detected if blank.

properties.name: smart.i18n.provider.fallback-enabled
properties.description: Enable fallback chain: if the primary provider fails, try the next available one.

properties.name: smart.i18n.provider.timeout-ms
properties.description: Timeout in milliseconds for provider API calls.

properties.name: smart.i18n.batch.max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of texts per batch translation call.

properties.name: smart.i18n.filter.min-length
properties.description: Minimum string length to be considered for translation.

properties.name: smart.i18n.filter.skip-patterns
properties.description: Additional regex patterns. Strings matching any of these will be skipped from translation.
